title: SiTime Q3 2021 Earnings - Strong Cash Generation and Guidance
text: SiTime reported quarterly earnings of $1.03 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.75 per share, compared to earnings of $0.23 per share a year ago. The company generated $24 million in positive cash flow from operations and invested $10.5 million in capex, increasing their cash balance by $13.5 million and ending the quarter with $267 million in cash and no bank debt. For Q4 2021 guidance, sales were expected to increase between 10% and 15% sequentially, reaching approximately $71 million at the midpoint. Q4 gross margins were expected to be between 64% and 66%, down slightly from Q3 due to seasonally higher consumer sales.
